input.content:
#!/bin/bash

# Review daily work sessions
# Usage: git review [date] (if no date, shows today)

DATE=${1:-$(date +"%Y-%m-%d")}
LOG_FILE=".git/daily-logs/$DATE.md"

if [ ! -f "$LOG_FILE" ]; then
    echo "No work log found for $DATE"
    echo "Available dates:"
    ls -1 .git/daily-logs/*.md 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\///' | sed 's/\.md$//' | sort -r
    exit 1
fi

echo "📅 Work Log for $DATE"
echo "======================"
cat "$LOG_FILE"
